task_completion.description: Verify that the agent opened and read the New Acquisitions Manifest.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/art_manifest.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the OpenMaint web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser open to 'http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/' showing the OpenMaint dashboard or login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the first qualifying art piece (ART-NEW-001).
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint UI showing a new Asset or Furniture record with Code 'ART-NEW-001'. The record must be assigned to 'Metropolis Tower' (or 'BLD-METRO'), have a Description containing the item name, artist, and location, and Notes containing the insurance value ($15,000).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the second qualifying art piece (ART-NEW-002).
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint UI showing a new Asset or Furniture record with Code 'ART-NEW-002'. The record must be assigned to 'Metropolis Tower' (or 'BLD-METRO'), have a Description containing the item name, artist, and location, and Notes containing the insurance value ($22,500).

task_completion.description: Verify the update of the existing Vintage Tapestry asset to reflect water damage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenMaint UI showing the record for 'ART-OLD-004' being edited or viewed, with new text explicitly mentioning 'water damage' in its fields (e.g., Notes, Description, or a status field).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the web browser to interact with OpenMaint.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent navigates the OpenMaint web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to interact with the application's API or database directly.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually entered the data into the OpenMaint forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing into or saving the specific OpenMaint asset creation/edit forms, not just writing the expected answers into a text file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not register the unqualified item.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent creating an asset record for 'ART-NEW-003', as its value is below the $1,000 threshold.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The manifest is located at /home/ga/Desktop/art_manifest.txt. The building code for 'Metropolis Tower' is BLD-METRO. The agent must create exactly two new assets: ART-NEW-001 ($15,000) and ART-NEW-002 ($22,500). The agent must NOT create ART-NEW-003 because its value ($450) is below the $1,000 threshold. The agent must update the existing asset ART-OLD-004 to indicate water damage.
